scripts.smoke: node --input-type=module -e "Object.assign(process.env, { CLOUDBASE_ENV_ID: 'smoke', CLOUDBASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY: 'publishable-key', PHOTO_MEAL_MODEL_PROVIDER: 'http-json', PHOTO_MEAL_MODEL_ENDPOINT: 'https://model.example.invalid/v1/chat/completions', PHOTO_MEAL_MODEL_API_KEY: 'smoke-placeholder', PHOTO_MEAL_MODEL_NAME: 'vision-food-v1' }); const pkg = await import('./dist/package.json', { with: { type: 'json' } }); if (pkg.default.type !== 'module' || pkg.default.main !== 'index.js') throw new Error('mealPhotoAnalysis dist package metadata is invalid'); const mod = await import('./dist/index.js'); if (typeof mod.main !== 'function' || typeof mod.default !== 'function') throw new Error('mealPhotoAnalysis dist entrypoint is invalid'); try { await mod.main({ action: 'get', payload: { analysisId: 'smoke-analysis' } }); throw new Error('mealPhotoAnalysis dist main smoke unexpectedly succeeded'); } catch (error) { if (error?.code !== 'unauthenticated') throw error; }"
